---
name: Docs gap
about: Report confusing, missing, stale, or incorrect documentation.
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

Use this for public documentation feedback. Do not paste private environment details or sensitive evidence into the issue.

## Docs Location

Link to the page or name the repo path where the issue appears.

## What Is Wrong Or Missing?

Describe the confusing, stale, incorrect, or missing part.

## What Should The Docs Say?

Suggest the clarification, example, command, or warning that would help.

## Who Is Blocked?

Choose one if useful:

- First-time DevKit user
- SDK integrator
- MCP integrator
- Platform administrator
- Security or compliance reviewer
- Not sure

## Public Issue Safety Check

- [ ] I have removed secrets, tokens, customer data, private URLs, and sensitive logs from this issue.
